narrative.context: A friend smiles and says they’re 'fine', but their eyes look tired and their voice is flat.
narrative.prompt: What helps you perceive their emotion more accurately?

options.label: Notice mismatched cues and invite sharing
options.description: Observe face + voice mismatch and gently ask: 'You seem tired—want to talk?'

ei.rationale: Integrates multiple emotional channels (verbal/nonverbal) to improve perception accuracy.

options.label: Assume they need space
options.description: Give them room without checking in.

ei.rationale: May be respectful, but perception is not confirmed; could miss a need for support.
Over-relies on verbal content; misses emotional cues that refine perception.

options.label: Insist they must be upset
options.description: Push them to admit something is wrong.

ei.rationale: Forces an interpretation; can create resistance and reduces accurate perception.
